cases.title: Private Medical Clinic
cases.description: Healthcare runs on fragmented tools: PMS, calendars, payments, labs, insurers, and WhatsApp, none of them talking to each other. We unify the stack into one brain, deploy AI employees for booking, triage, and follow-up, and turn the clinical team into power users who deploy agents across the clinic to improve patient experience, throughput, and care quality.
cases.quote: Patients book at 2am. Payments confirmed before they arrive. Our staff focuses on care, not phones.

cases.title: Loyalty Programs Company
cases.description: Enterprise operations run on a dozen SaaS tools that don't talk. We unify them into one brain, deploy AI employees for document processing, campaign ops, and financial consolidation, and turn leadership into power users who deploy agents across the company to improve quality, efficiency and cost structure.
cases.quote: 12 weeks from manual chaos to fully automated operations. Every process proves 95% precision before replacing the human.

cases.title: Premium Spirits Brand
cases.description: Import, export, and distribution businesses run on data scattered across stakeholders in the supply chain, with forecasting that's unreliable and planning that stays reactive. We unify the stack into one brain, deploy AI employees for demand forecasting, stockout prevention, and supply chain optimization, and turn the ops team into power users who deploy agents across the company to improve planning, margins, and negotiation leverage.
cases.quote: Every shipment decision is now backed by data, not guesswork.

cases.title: Family Office
cases.description: Family offices pay for dozens of SaaS providers but can't use them to improve portfolio construction across public, private, and alternative investments. We unify the stack into one brain that runs on local models so your data never leaves your walls, deploy AI employees to standardize decision-making and model risk and return for every underlying asset, and turn the team into power users who deploy agents across prospection, investing, tracking, and exits.
cases.quote: Every rebalance, trade, and tax decision runs on schedule, without manual intervention.
